folio.label: 136v
folio.l: As dide Democienis , dougúter dere
By cause that she wolde , nougút , defouled be
¢ O Cedasus , it is ful greet pitee
To reden how thyne dougútren deyeden , allas
That slowen he~ self , for suche manere cas
¢ As greet pitee was it , or wel more
The Theban Mayden , that for Nichamore
Hire seluen slougú , rigút for sucú manere woo
¢ An other Theban Mayden , did rigút so
For oon of Macedoigne , had hire oppressed
She witú hire detú , hire maydenhod redressed
¢ What shal I seyn , of Nycerates wyf
That for sucú cas , byrefte hir self hir lyf
¢ How trewe eke was , Alcebiades
His loue , that rathere for to dyen chees
Than for to suffre his body vnberied be
¢ Loo whicú a wyf , was Alceste q¶ she
¢ What seitú Omere , of goode Penelopee
Al grece knowetú , of hire chastitee
¢ îde of Laodomia , is wryten thus
That whan at Troie , was slayn Protheselaus
No lengere wold she lyue , after his day
¢ The same of noble Porcia , telle I may

note.notetxt: 740there is a cross in dry point in the left mrgin.ODR

folio.l: Witú oute Brutus , coude she , nat lyue
To whom she had al hool , hir herte ©yue
¢ The ¹fyt wyfhod , of Arthemesye
Honoured is , thorugú al the Barbarye
¢ O Theuta Quene , thy wyfly chastitee

note.notetxt: 746 Pause in writing. Double check. ODR

folio.l: To alle wyues , may a myrour be
Thus pleyned Dorigen , a day or tweye
Purposyngö euäe , that she wolde deye
But nathelees , vp on the thridde nygút
Hoom come Arueragus , this worthy knygút
And axed hire , why that she wepe so sore
And she gan wepen , euäe the lengere the more
Allas q¶ she , that euäe was I born~
Thus haue I seide q¶ she , thus haue I sworn~
And told hi~ al , as ©e han herd byfore
It nedetú nat , reherce it ©ow nomore
¢ This housbond witú glad chere , and frendly wyse
Answered & seide , as I shal ©ow deuyse
Is there out elles , Dorigen but this
Nay nay q¶ she , god help me so as wys
This is to meche , and it were goddis wylle

note.notetxt: 782 the additional lines are out as the manuscript has a leaf missing. ODR
